overall.description: Spider-Man is perched on a skyscraper ledge overlooking a bustling Times Square-style intersection in a video game environment. The scene features dense pedestrian crowds, heavy vehicle traffic, and towering glass buildings with massive digital billboards under bright midday sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: skyscraper ledge overlooking busy downtown intersection

events.description: Spider-Man shifts his posture from a crouched position to lean forward and look down more directly at the street below

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man is crouched on the building ledge, surveying the busy intersection and traffic below while remaining stationary

entered.detail: tall glass facade building with reflective windows that Spider-Man is perched upon
large red digital billboard mounted on the building across the intersection displaying advertisements
tall glass skyscraper with vertical digital signage and multiple window reflections
wide multi-lane avenue running through the downtown area filled with moving traffic

segments.scene_description: From a high vantage point on a skyscraper ledge, Spider-Man observes the bustling city below. The wide intersection is filled with dense crowds of pedestrians and heavy traffic moving along the asphalt streets. Towering glass buildings frame the view, with a prominent red digital billboard visible in the distance. At around 13 seconds, Spider-Man briefly shifts his crouched posture to lean forward before resuming his watchful position.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a high-altitude perspective from a skyscraper ledge, focusing on the sprawling urban activity of a dense city intersection. It begins with a wide view of the bustling streets below, where heavy vehicle traffic and thick crowds of pedestrians flow between towering glass buildings. As the camera lingers on the scene, a prominent red digital billboard stands out against the midday light in the distance. The perspective then shifts slightly as Spider-Man leans forward from his crouched position, momentarily changing his angle of observation before settling back into a watchful stance overlooking the metropolis.
